framing_signals_checked: Does the engineering layer claim the Gita is really a tech manual? No.
Does it claim Krishna was 'really talking about quitting jobs'? No — the engineering layer is presented as an analog, with the original kṣatriya-battle frame preserved in the source pack.
Does it project modern frames backward? No — uses modern engineering as analog without claiming the verse anticipated it.
verdict_reason: No tech-manual framing. Engineering layer is additive interpretation, not substitution. PASS.
